title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud announced enhanced data analytics agents with new developer tools including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. These tools enable building custom agents grounded in enterprise data and are accessible via Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech covers enhancements to its data analytics agents, centered on two developer tools: the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. The tools support building custom agents grounded in enterprise data, which matters for teams connecting agentic workflows to internal data sources. The integrations are accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs including VSCode.
